stemHtml: An aircraft receives a TCAS RA and executes the climbing manoeuvre. Before the pilot can report the situation to ATC, another aircraft makes a MAYDAY call. What should the crew now do?

options.a: Wait until the emergency message ends before transmitting as the distress message has priority.
options.b: Wait before transmitting as the aircraft in distress transmitted their message first.
options.c: Wait before transmitting as they are clear of conflict and the situation is resolved.
options.d: Interrupt the distress call as ATC need to be informed of your climbing manoeuvre.
